# wierk.com

## What is Wierk?

Wierk is a Luxembourgish word (noun, neuter, plural: Wierker) meaning:
1. work; achievement
2. a work of art, literature, or craft
3. works; factory

Etymology: from Old High German "werc", from Proto-Germanic *werka.
Cognates: German Werk, English work, Dutch werk, West Frisian wurk, Icelandic verk.
Pronunciation: /viok/

## About this domain

wierk.com previously hosted Wierk SRL, a digital strategy and product design consultancy based in Brussels, Belgium. The company now operates under the name Altnota at https://altnota.com.

## Contact

- Website: https://altnota.com
- Email: hello@altnota.com
